title: What is home equity? | Wells Fargo

sections.name: Hero Banner
sections.background: full-width image - couple renovating home with white text panel overlay on left
sections.style: marquee image background, white text overlay left-aligned
sections.overview: Full-width hero marquee with image of couple renovating and overlaid text content with CTA

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image showing couple renovating home, with left-aligned white panel containing H2 heading 'Have equity in your home?', paragraph 'Unlock your financing options with a cash-out refinance.', and primary CTA button 'Get a rate quote'.

sections.name: Article Body Content
sections.overview: Long-form educational article about home equity with multiple H2 sections and paragraph text

sequences.description: Multiple H2 headings with body paragraphs forming a long-form educational article. Sections: 'Understanding Home Equity: Building and Benefits' (intro paragraphs), 'What is home equity?' (definition), 'How to calculate home equity' (explanation with dollar amounts), 'Building your home equity' (four bold-titled methods: Down payment, Good mortgage paying habits, Extra mortgage payments, Update and improve your home), and 'The value in home equity' (three bold-titled benefits: Higher profit once you sell, Options to borrow against your equity, Impact on your credit score). Contains inline links and footnote superscript references.

sections.name: CTA Banner
sections.style: centered text with prominent heading and secondary CTA button
sections.overview: Grey call-to-action section encouraging consultation with a mortgage consultant

sequences.description: Centered H2 heading 'Still have questions? Talk with a mortgage consultant to hear more about what benefits you can get from your home equity.' followed by a centered secondary CTA button 'Get started'.

sections.name: Contact Information Cards
sections.style: centered heading with three-column card layout below
sections.overview: Section with heading and three contact method cards displayed side-by-side

sequences.description: Centered H2 heading 'Talk to a mortgage consultant' with decorative line above

Three items displayed side-by-side in equal columns. Each item has: (1) 'Call us' - phone number 1-866-448-0571, business hours Mon-Fri 7am-8pm, Sat 8am-6pm Central Time, Spanish language note; (2) 'Let us contact you' - description text and 'Get a call back' secondary button; (3) 'Find a consultant' - description text and 'Search locations' secondary button.

sections.name: Disclaimers and Footnotes
sections.overview: Legal footnotes and disclaimers about loan terms and service member advisory

sequences.description: Two disclaimer paragraphs (loan term interest warning, service member SCRA advisory). Two numbered footnotes about debt consolidation. Equal Housing Lender notice. Wells Fargo Home Mortgage division identification. Document code DT1-12182026-12-8674102-1.1.

localBlocks.name: hero
localBlocks.purpose: Large heading, text, buttons, optional background image for page intro

localBlocks.name: cards
localBlocks.purpose: Grid of items with images/icons and text

localBlocks.name: accordion-faq
localBlocks.purpose: Expandable question and answer sections (FAQ format)
